mano_cua.result_summary: mano-cua在DevTools中详细分析了a11y.css的文件格式建议功能。发现页面中a[href$='.png']链接的::before content为'none'，outline为默认链接颜色而非a11y.css警告色。可能因viewport宽度未满足media query(min-width:800px)导致a11y.css建议未生效。未能在超时前完成对head中link标签误报的完整验证。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Found that ::before content is 'none' for file-format links, outline color is default link color not a11y warning. Media query (min-width:800px) might not be met. Timeout before completing full verification of head link tag false positives.
